title: dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. elgonensis
intro: Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. elgonensis, also known as Elgon senecio, is a subspecies of the Dendrosenecio johnstonii plant, which is a type of succulent and flowering plant native to Mount Elgon in East Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Elgon senecio include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Elgon senecio typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications for medicinal purposes.
